title: Merck to buy Terns in $6.7B bet on a ‘differentiated’ leukemia drug
summary: If consummated, the deal would hand Merck a treatment that could challenge Novartis’ fast-selling Scemblix. But the low purchase premium may leave room for a competing bid, analysts said.
summary_ko: Merck는 Terns를 67억 달러에 인수하여 백혈병 치료제 시장에 진출한다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 17억 달러를 투자하고 자가면역 질환 치료제 개발에 나선다.

title: Endogenex nets $50M to carry intestinal diabetes procedure to the FDA
summary: The fundraising comes after clinical results showed its system met safety goals and led to metabolic improvements in HbA1c, fasting glucose levels and body weight.
summary_ko: Endogenex는 FDA 승인을 위해 소화기 제대루 치료를 개발하기 위해 5000만 달러를 조달했습니다. 임상 결과는 시스템이 안전성 목표를 달성하고 대사 개선을 보였습니다.

title: The FDA Is Fast-Tracking Health AI —Women’s Health Can’t Be Left Behind
summary:
Our biggest healthcare problems aren’t only cost or access, but the breakdown in how diagnoses are made, especially for women. Digital health’s new era of AI and real-time data is the most promising solution I’ve seen to fix this, but for these tools to work for women, they must be built on data that actually includes them.

title: Adonis Scores $40M for AI Platform Aiming to Boost Hospital Revenue
summary:

Customers include Mount Sinai Health System, Baptist Health South Florida, AdventHealth and ApolloMD.
